implementing_department: Backward Classes Development Department, Government of Kerala
description: Provides educational assistance to pre-matric students belonging to Other Eligible Communities (OEC) and Other Equivalent Communities studying in schools in Kerala.
objectives: Support education of students from OEC communities
Reduce school dropout rate among backward communities
eligibility: Student must belong to OEC or Other Equivalent Communities of Kerala
Student must be studying in Classes 1 to 10
Student must be enrolled in Government, Aided, Recognized Unaided, CBSE, ICSE or Kendriya Vidyalaya schools in Kerala
application_process: School authorities enter student details on the scholarship portal
Educational Officer verifies the submitted data
Amount is credited to the student's bank account through DBT
income_limit: No limit for OEC communities; ₹6,00,000 for Other Equivalent Communities
